sourceNotes: Source follow-up pass 47: official bathing-water profile supports Akrata beach identity/location in Achaia. Confidence, coordinates, access, services, amenities, wind profile, and scoring were not changed.

Popular source-backed confidence pass BB 2026-06-02: official bathing-water profile/PDF supports Akrata 1 identity in Aigialeia/Achaia, Corinthian Gulf setting, 820 m beach length, 5-50 m width, northeast orientation, rocky shore and seabed, deep first metres with steep seabed slope and 5 m isobath around 65 m, access via Leoforos Aigaiou, partly organized section with umbrellas, loungers, showers, waste bins and nearby food establishments. Promoted to high for static metadata only; corrected previous shallow-water, generic seasonal-service, no-organization/public-src mismatch, removed unsupported shade/parking and pinned unsupported snorkeling/surfing app activity flags false. Source wind-protection, water-quality/clarity and live-condition wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring or calm/protected/safe claims.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη ταυτότητα αναφέρει βαθιά πρώτα μέτρα, απότομη κλίση πυθμένα και ισοβαθή 5 μ. περίπου στα 25 μ. από την ακτή.

sourceNotes: OSM source pass 2026-05-27: same-name natural=beach feature near stored coordinates supports identity/location only. Confidence, access, services, amenities, and scoring were not changed.

Official Achaia bathing-profile cleanup 2026-05-29: the official Egkali profile supports identity/location, pebble/rocky shore and seabed, asphalt-road access, deep first meters with steep seabed slope, organized southeast section with umbrellas, sunbeds, showers, bins and refreshment facility, plus tall vegetation. Confidence promoted to medium; no wind, wave, water-quality, or live-condition claim was imported.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: official Egkali bathing-water profile evidence already supports identity/location, pebble/rocky shore and seabed, asphalt-road access, deep first meters with steep seabed slope, organized section with umbrellas, sunbeds, showers, bins and refreshment facility, plus tall vegetation. Promoted to high static metadata confidence; no windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality/live safety, or calm/protected claim was changed.
